overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character with a large yellow backpack traversing a rocky desert landscape. The character walks along a sandy path, follows a river through rocky terrain, climbs alongside a waterfall, and reaches an overlook with distant structures visible through haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: arid desert path approaching river canyon

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a sandy desert path toward distant mountains and a visible river

entered.detail: large rocky mountain formations forming the backdrop of the desert landscape
light-colored sandy trail winding through sparse vegetation
scattered small bushes and dry grasses along the path edges
prominent boulder and rock outcropping beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide desert path with sandy ground and sparse vegetation. Rocky mountains rise in the distance while large rock formations dot the landscape. The environment is bright and arid, with the character moving steadily forward toward a river visible in the far distance.

events.description: terrain shifts from sandy desert path to rocky riverbank as the river becomes prominent

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky riverbank, navigating around boulders while following the water's edge

entered.detail: flowing river with clear water running through the rocky canyon
steep rock face rising up from the opposite side of the river
massive rock formation beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from sandy terrain to a rocky riverbank. The river flows prominently on the right side, bordered by steep rocky cliffs. Large boulders appear on the left as the character navigates the uneven gravel surface along the water's edge.

events.description: character begins climbing up rocky terrain alongside rushing waterfall rapids

agents.ego_description: carefully climbing up the rocky slope next to turbulent waterfall rapids, using hands to steady on rocks

entered.detail: turbulent white water rushing down the rocky channel with strong current
vertical rock wall rising alongside the waterfall

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep rocky slope alongside powerful waterfall rapids. The river transforms into turbulent white water cascading down the rocks. The space becomes more enclosed between the climbing wall and the rushing water, with the character carefully navigating the vertical terrain.

events.description: character stops climbing and reaches the overlook, pausing to view the landscape
distant structures and ruins become visible through the atmospheric haze

agents.ego_description: standing still at the cliff edge, looking out over the vast landscape toward distant ruins

entered.detail: ancient structures and ruins visible through haze on the horizon
expansive view of the canyon and desert valley below
tall building-like silhouettes in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the top of the waterfall and stops at a rocky overlook. The view opens up to reveal a vast valley with distant ruins and mysterious structures visible through atmospheric haze. The waterfall now flows below to the left as the character surveys the expansive desert landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an arid desert that transforms from a wide open plain into a steep river gorge and finally a high mountain overlook. It begins with the character walking along a wide sandy path dotted with sparse vegetation and distant rock formations. As the terrain shifts, the camera follows the character onto a rocky riverbank where the landscape narrows between steep cliffs and large boulders. The scene then ascends a steep slope alongside turbulent white water cascading down a waterfall, with the environment becoming increasingly enclosed and vertical. Finally, the camera reaches the summit and opens up to a vast valley, revealing distant ruins and mysterious structures shrouded in atmospheric haze.
